milestone: AGH v1 Patch 3 — artifact-promotion bridge closure (governed active/challenger swap + deterministic spectrum refresh + product-visible surface reflection)
scope: Extend Patch 2's operator-gated horizon_provenance bridge to the registry_entries layer. A RegistryUpdateProposalV1 with target='registry_entry_artifact_promotion' can now be approved by an operator; on the next harness-tick, registry_patch_executor atomically (1) swaps active_artifact_id and challenger_artifact_ids on the target registry entry, (2) refreshes spectrum_rows_by_horizon[horizon] via the canonical build_spectrum_rows_from_validation path (full recompute) OR carries the prior rows over with a stale_after_active_swap=True marker (fixture/DB-unavailable fallback), (3) appends a bounded FIFO entry to bundle.recent_governed_applies so Today can render a governed-apply badge without a new worker. A new SpectrumRefreshRecordV1 packet audits the refresh outcome and cites the full proposal → decision → applied chain. The LLM orchestrator (L5) gains vocabulary for the new target but cannot trigger any apply.

user_decisions.q_spectrum_refresh: A — Full recompute from validation via canonical fetch_joined + build_spectrum_rows_from_validation. When the live Supabase client / validation data are unavailable (fixture runs), the helper must NOT silently skip: it carries over the prior rows with stale_after_active_swap=True + stale_since_utc and records outcome='carry_over_fixture_fallback' / 'carry_over_db_unavailable' with needs_db_rebuild=True.
user_decisions.q_surface_path: Y — No new worker and no new packet stream for surface visibility. registry_patch_executor writes a bounded FIFO bundle.recent_governed_applies entry in the same atomic write as the swap; Today reads that field directly (capped to 5 per horizon).

RegistryPatchAppliedPacketV1.payload.tar.extension: Dispatches on target. For 'registry_entry_artifact_promotion': requires registry_entry_id + horizon; before_snapshot / after_snapshot are registry-entry shaped (active_artifact_id + challenger_artifact_ids); after_snapshot may be empty iff outcome='conflict_skip'.

SpectrumRefreshRecordV1.purpose: Audit packet emitted by registry_patch_executor on every outcome='applied' for target='registry_entry_artifact_promotion'. Ties the spectrum_rows_by_horizon mutation to the governed apply and makes 'needs_db_rebuild' visible for operator / L5.
payload_keys: needs_db_rebuild (bool; True iff rows were carried over unchanged)
invariants: cited_applied_packet_id non-empty (executor upserts the record AFTER the applied packet).
outcome='recomputed' ⇒ needs_db_rebuild is False; carry_over_* ⇒ True.

BrainBundleV0.recent_governed_applies.cap: 20 most-recent FIFO entries (oldest evicted on apply)
BrainBundleV0.recent_governed_applies.written_by: registry_patch_executor ONLY on outcome='applied'; never on conflict_skip / reject / defer.

write_chain_for_artifact_promotion: from-state validation: active_artifact_id / challenger_artifact_ids / horizon MUST match proposal.payload.from_*; mismatch short-circuits to outcome='conflict_skip' with blocking_reasons.
to-state validation: to_active_artifact_id + every to_challenger_artifact_id MUST be present in bundle.artifacts and share the registry entry horizon; otherwise retryable=False DLQ.
append a bounded FIFO entry to bundle_dict['recent_governed_applies'] (cap=20)
non_goals: No SQL writes to any registry table.
No new worker for surface visibility — Today reads bundle.recent_governed_applies directly.
No change to LLM-derived copy path; L5 only gains vocabulary.

layer5_orchestrator_updates.state_reader: state_reader_agent._collect(routed_kind='why_changed') now includes SpectrumRefreshRecordV1 (asset-neutral signal, surfaces carry-over flag).
layer5_orchestrator_updates.system_prompt_vocab: Adds registry_entry_artifact_promotion / SpectrumRefreshRecordV1 / needs_db_rebuild. The LLM must describe carry-over refreshes as 'spectrum rows carried over from the prior active artifact — a DB rebuild is pending' rather than as a completed recomputation.

today_surface_visibility.source: BrainBundleV0.recent_governed_applies, filtered by horizon, sorted by applied_at_utc desc.
today_surface_visibility.per_entry_shape: target, horizon, registry_entry_id, proposal_packet_id, decision_packet_id, applied_packet_id, from_active_artifact_id, to_active_artifact_id, applied_at_utc, spectrum_refresh_outcome, spectrum_refresh_needs_db_rebuild.
today_surface_visibility.honesty_guard: If no governed apply has landed for this horizon, the field is an empty list — not missing — so the UI can stably render the placeholder without inventing activity.

replay_lineage_api.chain_shape: list of {proposal, decision, applied, spectrum_refresh} blocks, newest-first by proposal.created_at_utc.
replay_lineage_api.backcompat: Also surfaces horizon_provenance proposals whose target_scope.registry_entry_id matches (Patch 2 interop).

effect: No other schema change — canonical write continues in the brain bundle JSON, not SQL.

new_tests.test_agentic_registry_artifact_promotion: 23 tests — packet contract surface. REGISTRY_PROPOSAL_TARGETS / REGISTRY_BUNDLE_HORIZONS / SPECTRUM_REFRESH_OUTCOMES vocabulary stability. RegistryUpdateProposalV1 validation for the new target (identical from/to reject, duplicate-challenger reject, empty evidence_refs reject, unknown horizon reject, non-list challenger reject). RegistryPatchAppliedPacketV1 snapshot shape for artifact promotion. SpectrumRefreshRecordV1 schema (outcome literals, needs_db_rebuild, cited ids, row counts, sample cap, active_registry_mutation rejection).
new_tests.test_agentic_artifact_promotion_executor: 8 tests — approve(carry-over) happy path (swap + stale carry-over + recent_governed_applies append + applied packet + refresh packet + proposal → applied). approve(recompute) happy path via monkey-patched fetch_joined + build_spectrum_rows (rows replaced, needs_db_rebuild=False). active_artifact mismatch → conflict_skip (bundle unchanged). challenger set mismatch → conflict_skip. to_active_artifact missing in bundle → retryable=False DLQ. to_active horizon mismatch → retryable=False DLQ. recent_governed_applies FIFO cap enforced (21st apply evicts oldest). bundle_integrity_failed → retryable=False DLQ, no write, no applied/refresh packet.
6 tests — supabase_client=None → carry_over_fixture_fallback with stale flags. Unparseable artifact spec (no factor: prefix) → carry_over_fixture_fallback. fetch_joined raises → carry_over_db_unavailable with blocking_reasons. fetch_joined ok=False → carry_over_db_unavailable. fetch_joined ok but build_spectrum_rows returns zero rows → carry_over_db_unavailable. Happy path full recompute → rows replaced, stale flags cleared, needs_db_rebuild=False.
new_tests.test_today_spectrum_recent_governed_appl: 3 tests — recent_governed_applies_for_horizon exposed on Today payload and filtered by horizon. Per-horizon cap=5 enforced when bundle has more than 5 applies. Missing bundle field defaults to empty list (not missing).
4 tests — full chain constructed newest-first. horizon filter + registry_entry_id filter both honored. horizon_provenance proposals still surface (Patch 2 interop). missing registry_entry_id → ok=False.

extended_tests.test_agentic_packets_v1.py: Asserts SpectrumRefreshRecordV1 joins PACKET_TYPES and PACKET_TYPE_TO_CLASS.
extended_tests.test_agentic_layer5_orchestrator_v1.py: Two new tests — (1) _SYSTEM_PROMPT teaches registry_entry_artifact_promotion / SpectrumRefreshRecordV1 / needs_db_rebuild vocabulary. (2) state_reader_agent.why_changed includes SpectrumRefreshRecordV1 as an asset-neutral governance-lineage signal.

test_coverage.full_suite_green: 303 agentic+today+traceability+metis_brain+replay tests pass. 1055 non-agentic+full-repo tests pass (excluding the pre-existing phase39 hypothesis-family failure known since Patch 2).

five_scenarios_captured.observed: active_artifact_id swapped art_active_v0 → art_challenger_v0 atomically; spectrum rows carried over (AAA/BBB/CCC) with stale_after_active_swap=True on all 3; SpectrumRefreshRecordV1.outcome=carry_over_fixture_fallback, needs_db_rebuild=True; recent_governed_applies length=1; proposal.status=applied.

active_artifact_id swapped; spectrum rows fully replaced (AAA/BBB/CCC → NEW_A/NEW_B/NEW_C) with no stale flags; SpectrumRefreshRecordV1.outcome=recomputed, refresh_mode=full_recompute_from_validation, needs_db_rebuild=False; recent_governed_applies length=1; proposal.status=applied.
bundle unchanged (active still art_active_v0); 0 apply jobs; 0 RegistryPatchAppliedPacketV1; 0 SpectrumRefreshRecordV1; recent_governed_applies empty; proposal.status=rejected.
bundle unchanged; RegistryDecisionPacketV1 carries next_revisit_hint_utc=2026-04-26T00:00:00+00:00; 0 applied/refresh packets; recent_governed_applies empty; proposal.status=deferred.

proposal claimed from_active=art_unrelated_v0 but bundle active is art_active_v0; applied packet outcome=conflict_skip with blocking_reasons=['active_mismatch:...']; bundle unchanged; 0 SpectrumRefreshRecordV1; recent_governed_applies empty; proposal.status=deferred.

safety_gates_honored.no_direct_brain_bundle_writes: Only registry_patch_executor writes the bundle, only via validate_merged_bundle_dict + write_bundle_json_atomic, only on outcome='applied'.
safety_gates_honored.no_silent_refresh_skip: When Supabase is unavailable, rows are carried over with stale_after_active_swap=True and needs_db_rebuild=True — Today and L5 both surface the flag.
safety_gates_honored.no_llm_derived_registry_writes: record_registry_decision + registry_patch_executor + refresh_spectrum_rows_for_horizon are deterministic and LLM-free.
safety_gates_honored.recent_governed_applies_bounded: Hard cap=20 enforced by executor; per-horizon cap=5 enforced by Today surface.
safety_gates_honored.no_active_registry_mutation_field: SpectrumRefreshRecordV1 joins RegistryUpdateProposalV1 / RegistryDecisionPacketV1 / RegistryPatchAppliedPacketV1 in rejecting raw 'active_registry_mutation' payloads.
safety_gates_honored.today_surface_honesty: recent_governed_applies_for_horizon always present (possibly empty); stale rows still carry stale_after_active_swap markers so copy cannot claim a recomputed rationale.

deferred_scope_for_future_patches.live_supabase_recompute_verification: Unit tests exercise the fake-DB path. An end-to-end live run with a real Supabase client + validation data remains to be captured (deferred per Patch 1 FMP decision shape).
deferred_scope_for_future_patches.surface_action_queue_worker: Still unregistered — follow-up candidate if we ever want push-style notification on a new proposal or apply.
deferred_scope_for_future_patches.multi_horizon_batched_refresh: Current executor refreshes only the horizon named by the proposal. Batched cross-horizon governed applies are out of scope.

acceptance_matrix_work_order_alignment.§3_non_negotiables: All honored — no direct bundle writes outside the executor; no LLM-derived writes; operator approval required; spectrum refresh is deterministic or explicitly marked stale; honesty preserved; single source of truth.
acceptance_matrix_work_order_alignment.§5_patch_plan_A_to_F: A (packet + bundle schema + migration), B (spectrum helper + executor target dispatch + artifact promotion path), C (L5 state reader + prompt), D (Today surface field), E (replay lineage API), F (tests + runbook + evidence + handoff) — all closed.
acceptance_matrix_work_order_alignment.§6_out_of_scope_respected: No SQL registry tables touched; no schema migrations beyond the CHECK constraint; no new worker for surface visibility; no LLM in the apply path.
